context.audience: Non-technical founders building MVPs without coding, developers evaluating low-code platforms for rapid prototyping, teams automating business workflows with visual builders
pain_points: Hitting the limitations of no-code platforms when business logic gets complex
Migrating from no-code to custom code when the platform becomes a bottleneck
Data portability and vendor lock-in with no-code platform providers
Integrating AI features into no-code workflows and automations
Performance and scalability constraints of no-code-built applications
monetization: No-code to custom code migration services
content_that_works: AI integration in no-code platforms articles
